title: gene_annotations: update docs/project-spec.md (results-db)
description: Document the gene_annotations table/view in genetics-results-db/docs/project-spec.md: whole-universe one-row-per-gene, source (HGNC complete-set joined to GENCODE coords + gene_has_family/hierarchy_closure for full-lineage group arrays), GRCh38/chrX=23 convention, manual WRITE_TRUNCATE refresh, provenance columns, and the cis/trans + any-group query patterns.

title: gene_annotations: expose via schema API (api/main.py + datasets.yaml)
description: Append 'gene_annotations_v' to VIEWS in api/main.py. Add a tables.gene_annotations_v block to configs/datasets.yaml: column descriptions + TWO example queries -- (a) any-group enumeration with coords: SELECT symbol,chr,gene_start,gene_end FROM gene_annotations_v WHERE 139 IN UNNEST(gene_group_ids); (b) cis-pQTL filter: JOIN colocalization_v c ON c.trait2=a.symbol WHERE c.data_type2='pQTL' AND SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(c.hit2,':')[OFFSET(1)] AS INT64) BETWEEN a.gene_start-1000000 AND a.gene_end+1000000. Makes get_bigquery_schema surface the table + the cis/trans and group-array patterns for query_bigquery users.

title: gene_annotations: loader (load_gene_annotations.sh + load_data.py)
description:
Write the gene_annotations loader. Two parts: (A) add SCHEMAS['gene_annotations'] to scripts/load_data.py; (B) scripts/load_gene_annotations.sh (+ any polars helper).

SOURCE FILES (all GCS, fsspec/gcsfs; finngen bucket shown, daly mirrors under gs://daly-genetics-results/mapping_files/):
- HGNC complete-set (EXISTS): gs://finngen-commons/results_api_data/mapping_files/hgnc_complete_set.txt -> hgnc_id, symbol, name, ensembl_gene_id, alias_symbol, prev_symbol (pipe '|'), locus_type, entrez_id (ncbi).
- GENCODE coords v49 (EXISTS): gs://finngen-commons/results_api_data/mapping_files/gencode.v49.annotation.genes.tsv -> gene_id (versioned ENSG; strip '.N'), chrom (STRING 1-22/X/Y/M), gene_start, gene_end, gene_strand (+/-). Convert chrom to INT: X->23, Y->24, M->25 (match BigQuery convention where X=23; document choice). strand IS available.
- HGNC gene-group files (USER WILL UPLOAD to gs://.../mapping_files/; do NOT assume present at runtime): hgnc_gene_has_family.tsv (hgnc_id, family_id), hgnc_hierarchy_closure.tsv (parent_fam_id, child_fam_id, distance -- already transitive), hgnc_family.tsv (family id + name). VERIFY exact column headers from genenames.org/download/gene-groups/ docs (WebFetch) since files aren't local.

BUILD (polars, like scripts/munge_*.py): per gene -> core HGNC fields; join GENCODE coords by stripped ensembl id -> chr(int)/gene_start/gene_end/strand; compute FULL lineage gene_group_ids/names: leaf family_ids from gene_has_family, expand via hierarchy_closure (child_fam_id -> all parent_fam_ids), union leaf+ancestors, map ids->names via family. Keep olfactory. Stamp gencode_version='49', hgnc_version, download_date.

ARRAY LOAD (critical): load_data.py uses CSV/TSV which CANNOT load ARRAY/REPEATED columns. For gene_annotations the loader MUST use NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON (or Parquet); SCHEMAS['gene_annotations'] SchemaField for gene_group_ids/gene_group_names = mode='REPEATED'. Emit each gene as a JSON object with those two fields as arrays. WRITE_TRUNCATE full rebuild.

VALIDATION: add a unit test (pytest, small in-repo fixtures for gene_has_family + hierarchy_closure + a tiny hgnc/gencode sample) asserting the lineage closure is correct (e.g. a gene whose leaf is a child family also gets the ancestor/root family id+name) and chr X->23 conversion. Do NOT run against live GCS/BigQuery (gene-group files not uploaded yet); end-to-end load is deferred.

title: gene_annotations: view (schemas/gene_annotations_v.sql)
description: Create schemas/gene_annotations_v.sql selecting from gene_annotations and adding a constant resource='hgnc' column for _v consistency with other views. setup_bigquery.sh auto-discovers *_v.sql after base tables.

title: gene_annotations: table DDL (schemas/gene_annotations.sql)
description: Create schemas/gene_annotations.sql -- one row per gene, whole gene universe. Columns: hgnc_id STRING, symbol STRING, name STRING, prev_symbols STRING, alias_symbols STRING, ensembl_gene_id STRING, ncbi_gene_id STRING, chr INT64 (X=23, GRCh38), gene_start INT64, gene_end INT64, strand STRING, locus_type STRING, gene_group_ids (ARRAY/REPEATED INT64, full lineage = leaf + all ancestors), gene_group_names (ARRAY/REPEATED STRING), gencode_version STRING, hgnc_version STRING, download_date DATE. Unpartitioned reference table, CLUSTER BY symbol. Mirror schemas/asm_qtl.sql style; arrays use mode REPEATED in the load_data.py SchemaField.

title: Feature: HGNC reference data (gene groups + core annotations) in BigQuery
description: Materialize a single whole-universe gene_annotations table in BigQuery as a SELF-CONTAINED query_bigquery surface -- its primary justification is the cis/trans QTL bulk scan (gene coordinates JOINed to colocalization_v/credible_sets_v, which live in BigQuery and cannot be joined inside the API). The mcp-server specialized tools (get_gene_group_members, normalize_gene_symbols) do NOT read this table -- they call the genetics-results-api instead (epic genetics-results-api-8de). This table is reached ONLY via query_bigquery/get_bigquery_schema. It is fed from the SAME HGNC source as the API (HGNC complete-set joined to GENCODE coords, the join genetics-results-api/app/services/search_service.py:144 builds in memory; plus gene_has_family + hierarchy_closure for full-lineage gene_group_ids arrays), so API and BigQuery stay consistent. Columns: hgnc_id, symbol, name, prev_symbols, alias_symbols, ensembl_gene_id, ncbi_gene_id, chr (X=23, GRCh38), gene_start, gene_end, strand, locus_type, gene_group_ids ARRAY<INT64> (full lineage, any group queryable via 139 IN UNNEST(...)), gene_group_names ARRAY<STRING>, gencode_version, hgnc_version, download_date. GRCh38 + chrX=23 to match existing views. Manual on-demand WRITE_TRUNCATE refresh with provenance cols.
